LanguageData.NCL_Building_MissileSilo.label: Iron Rain" Vertical Launch Interception System
LanguageData.NCL_Building_MissileSilo.description:
The "Iron Rain" Vertical Launch Interception System is a globally deployed missile defense platform independently developed by NCL. Utilizing dedicated missile silos as its core delivery platform, this system launches dense salvos of medium-range anti-missile interceptors to neutralize incoming threats.
Operating through automated long-range tracking, it provides full-map-range defense by identifying hostile projectiles and destroying them mid-trajectory. Each silo houses an integrated miniature missile production facility that autonomously manufactures replacement interceptors. Production and launch of each interceptor consumes minimal resources (10 steel + 50 power units).
LanguageData.Nyar_IronRain_Rocket.label: IronRain Rocket
